name: HWR_WLNS_NEWS_B
description: This table holds the wellness news

columns.Name: NEWS_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the table

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the start date of the corresponding news

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the end date of the corresponding news

columns.Name: NEWS_LINK
columns.Comments: This column holds the link for the news

columns.Name: NEWS_IMAGE
columns.Comments: This column holds image for the news

columns.Name: ORDER_RANK
columns.Comments: This column stores the rank of the news

columns.Name: IS_DELETED
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the news deleted or not

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
